message:
🐛 Fix 5 remaining Go test failures after handleK8sError refactor (#5066)

- TestMCPGetPods_InternalErrorIsSanitized: update assertion to match
  structured error response (clusterStatus/errorType/errorMessage)
  instead of flat "error" field
- TestMCPGetEvents_NetworkErrorReturnsUnavailable: expect 503, not 200
- TestMCPGetNodes_NetworkErrorReturnsUnavailable: expect 503, not 200
- TestMCPGetPods_AuthErrorReturnsUnavailable: expect 503, not 200
- TestAntigravityProvider_Handshake_NotInstalled: override PATH so
  detectCLI() cannot find a real CLI binary on the test machine

These tests were broken by the handleK8sError refactor that changed
network/auth/internal errors from 200 to proper HTTP status codes
(503/500) with structured JSON payloads.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,6 +7,9 @@ import (
 )
 
 func TestAntigravityProvider_Handshake_NotInstalled(t *testing.T) {
+	// Override PATH so detectCLI() cannot find a real CLI binary.
+	t.Setenv("PATH", t.TempDir())
+
 	p := &AntigravityProvider{} // No cliPath set
 
 	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 5*time.Second)
